api.heroSub: Return paid resources directly in the response.
validation.walletRequired: Enter the wallet address where you want to get paid.
validation.walletLength: Wallet address must be 42 characters (0x plus 40 hexadecimal digits).
validation.walletHex: Only the digits 0–9 and letters a–f are allowed after 0x.
home.heroSubhead: For humans, agents, and everything in between
home.demoBandTitle: Make a request. Pay. Get the response.
home.audienceCreatorsBody: Sell links, downloads, content, and one-off access from posts or QR codes.
home.audienceSoftwareBody: Monetize API calls, actions, and machine-readable access.
home.creatorsCard1Description: Turn any link into a checkout. Share it anywhere and get paid before access opens.
home.creatorsCard2Description: Sell files, bundles, and digital goods with a pay-first download flow.
home.creatorsCard3Description: Charge once for guides, lessons, releases, or premium content with instant access after payment.
home.creatorsCard4Description: Unlock private pages, previews, drops, or limited-access content with one-time payment.
home.creatorsCard5Description: Turn a post, bio, thread, or QR code into a simple checkout for your next drop.
home.softwareCard1Description: Charge per request. Clients pay, retry, and unlock responses programmatically.
home.softwareCard2Description: Charge for sends, jobs, mints, or one-time operations that run after payment clears.
home.softwareCard3Description: Use HTTP 402 so agents and apps can pay, retry, and access capabilities through a clean programmatic flow.
home.postPaymentOpensHelper: Paste a link to your file, video, or page. You host it, we handle access.
home.railCreateDisabledHint: Switch to Sell to create a payment link.
home.successSupporting: Your unlock page is ready to share.
home.keepCopyHelper: Email yourself this payment link and QR so you can access it later.
home.receiptFailed: Could not send receipt. Try again.
home.label: Label
home.receiverHint: USDC on Base will be sent here
home.deliveryDirectBlurb: Buyer receives the final link immediately after payment.
home.deliveryProtectedBlurb1: Buyer receives a short-lived access link instead of your raw URL.
home.protectedTtlHint: Leave empty for 900 (15 minutes). Allowed range: 60–604800.
home.errorProtectedUrl: Enter a valid http(s) URL for the final destination.
home.errorPostPaymentUrl: Enter a valid http(s) URL for what opens after payment.
home.errorProtectedTtl: TTL must be a whole number of seconds between 60 and 604800.
home.createErrorNetwork: Network error — check your connection or API configuration.
home.why402Tagline: The internet got links. Commerce never got simpler.
home.why402Lead: Most payment systems assume a store, a cart, an account, or a full checkout flow. But a lot of real commerce does not start there.
home.why402Examples:
A thrift shop item on a shelf.
A table at a market.
A link in a TikTok bio.
A QR code on a flyer.
A one-time service.
An API call.
A machine action.
home.why402Closer: It lets you turn almost anything into something payable with a link, a QR code, or an API. Create a price, share it anywhere, and get paid simply.
home.why402EverydayBody: Sell physical goods, local items, event entry, one-off services, tips, and simple payments without needing a full storefront.
home.why402CreatorBody: Sell content, drops, downloads, private access, and social-first offers anywhere a link or QR code can go.
home.why402MachineBody: Monetize API calls, actions, and programmable access with the same core payment rail.
home.howItWorksBody: Share your pay link or QR. Buyers pay USDC on Base; funds go to the wallet on the resource, and they land on your success page for that slug.
demo.heroSubtitle: This is what 402 returns after payment.
demo.payoffFoot: Returned directly over HTTP after payment.
demo.flow4Outcome: → Receives the JSON payload in the response body.
demo.why3: A paid resource returned directly over HTTP.
howItWorks.lede: You define amount, label, and payout wallet. Someone pays USDC on Base through your link or QR. Funds go straight to that wallet. 402 verifies the payment so everyone sees the same result.
howItWorks.step1Body: Enter an amount, a short label, and the Base address where you want USDC to land. 402 gives you a link and QR code for that exact request.
howItWorks.step2Body: Drop the link in chat, email, or a bio. Show the QR in person. Buyers pay from their own wallet. They do not need a 402 account.
howItWorks.step3Body: USDC arrives in your wallet. 402 watches the payment, matches it to your link, and marks the request complete when it checks out.
howItWorks.underBody1: The transfer is recorded on the blockchain as USDC on Base. It settles in the wallet encoded in your link, not in a 402 balance.
howItWorks.underBody2: 402 detects that transfer, compares amount and details against your request, and only then records it as paid.
howItWorks.underBody3: Until verification succeeds, the request stays unpaid. Nothing is assumed.
howItWorks.whyBody1: Stripe routes money through merchant accounts and its own infrastructure. Venmo and similar apps expect both sides inside the same product. A plain wallet QR usually does not pin amount, label, and a clean receipt for one sale.
howItWorks.whyBody2: 402 is lighter. No accounts to open here. No Stripe dependency. No platform holding your funds. You fill a few fields, share one link, and buyers pay USDC on Base directly into the address you chose.
howItWorks.trustBody1: We confirm payments instead of guessing. Status updates only after verification lines up with the request you created.
howItWorks.trustBody2: Wrong amount or wrong link means it will not show as paid for that sale.
howItWorks.trustBody3: Each link is its own request, so separate payments stay separate.
howItWorks.closing: Money moves wallet to wallet. We keep the record straight.

pay.session.watchingHint: We watch this page for your payment—keep it open until access is ready.
pay.session.patienceHint: This usually takes a few seconds. You can leave this tab in the background.
pay.session.autoOpenFallback: If nothing opens automatically, tap Open resource.
pay.session.loadDeliveryFailed: Could not load your access yet (HTTP {{status}}).
pay.session.phase.connectingSubtitle: Setting up a secure payment session for this item.
pay.session.phase.awaitingSubtitle: When you are ready, pay with your wallet. We will pick it up from here.
pay.session.phase.detectedSubtitle: We are confirming your transfer on the network.
pay.session.phase.failedSubtitle: This session could not continue. You can start fresh below.
pay.slugMissing: Missing payment slug in the URL.
pay.loadFailed: Could not load this payment. Check your connection and try again.
pay.attemptInvalid: This payment link is invalid or no longer available.
pay.attemptSlugMismatch: This payment link does not match this product.
pay.payBaseUnavailable: Wallet payment isn’t available for this resource (check payout address and USDC on Base).
pay.metaMaskUnavailable: Wallet payment isn’t available for this resource (check payout address and USDC on Base).
pay.pasteTxHash: Paste the transaction hash from your wallet or block explorer.
pay.txHashInvalid: That does not look like a valid transaction hash (expected 0x followed by 64 hex characters).
pay.freeUnlockingSubtitle: No payment required. We are preparing your access.
pay.deliveryQrCaption: Scan to open on another device
pay.verifySecondaryLink: Already paid? Verify with transaction hash
pay.autoDetectFooter: We’ll detect your Base USDC transfer automatically.
pay.verifyBrief: Create a payment link, then paste your transaction hash if you need to verify manually.
pay.advancedInstructionDetail: Send {{amount}} {{currency}} on Base to the recipient for this link. We watch for the USDC transfer automatically; use verification here if status hasn’t updated yet (for example right after MetaMask or a block explorer confirms the transaction).
pay.walletLinksUnavailableShort: Wallet deep link isn’t available for this resource — use verification below once you’ve sent USDC on Base.
pay.inProgressShort: After you send USDC, open payment status — or verify with a transaction hash.
pay.title: Pay
pay.subtitle: Send USDC on Base from your wallet—we detect the transfer automatically. Use Advanced only if you need to verify with a transaction hash.
pay.openPayWithoutLink: Open pay page without this link
pay.desktopQrCaption: Scan with your phone to pay in the Base app
pay.desktopErrNoWallet: Install a browser wallet (MetaMask or Coinbase Wallet), or use Copy payment link / QR to pay on your phone.
pay.desktopErrRejected: Request was cancelled in your wallet.
pay.desktopCopyFailed: Could not copy to the clipboard.
pay.payWithWalletHint: Opens your wallet with Base, USDC, amount, and payee prefilled. Works with Coinbase Wallet, MetaMask, the Base app, and other EIP-681 compatible wallets.
pay.walletLinksUnavailable: Wallet links are unavailable (no payout address on Base for this resource). Use Advanced to verify with a transaction hash.
pay.inProgressBody: After you send USDC on Base, open payment status. Tap Pay with wallet again if you need to reopen your wallet with the same details.
pay.advancedInstruction: Send {{amount}} {{currency}} on Base to the recipient for this link. The server detects USDC on Base automatically when you open the status page; use this form only if you need to force verification with a known transaction hash (e.g. from MetaMask or a block explorer).
pay.devMockBody: With <mono>X402_MOCK_VERIFY=true</mono> on the worker, mock verify skips the chain (not for production).
pay.statusApiNote: We keep checking until your USDC transfer on Base is confirmed.
success.subtitle.errorNoAttempt: We could not read this attempt from the worker. Check the link or try again.
success.subtitle.checking: Checking your payment attempt with the server…
success.subtitle.paid: Your payment was confirmed and this attempt is marked paid.
success.subtitle.payment_required: This page checks the server every few seconds. Complete the transfer from the pay page, or use Advanced there if you need to submit a transaction hash.
success.subtitle.pending: This page checks the server every few seconds. Complete the transfer or wait for confirmation.
success.subtitle.failed: This attempt did not complete successfully. Start a new payment from the pay page if you still need access.
success.subtitle.expired: This attempt is no longer valid. Create a new attempt from the pay page.
success.subtitle.created: The attempt was just created and is not ready for payment yet.
success.subtitle.default: Status is reported by the worker. If this looks wrong, refresh or contact support.
success.slugMismatch: Route slug <slug1>{{routeSlug}}</slug1> does not match attempt slug <slug2>{{attemptSlug}}</slug2>. Trust the attempt row below.
success.footnoteTruth: Truth comes from <mono>GET /api/payment-attempt/:id</mono> only. Query-string flags are not used as payment proof.
success.missingSubtitle: This page needs an <mono1>attemptId</mono1> from the x402 flow (e.g. <mono2>/success/demo-001?attemptId=…</mono2>). Without it, we cannot show verified payment status.
legacy.title: Legacy Coinbase checkout session
legacy.subtitle: Older flow using <mono1>/api/payment-session</mono1>. Unrelated to x402 payment attempts; shown only when <mono2>sessionId</mono2> is present.
legacy.footnote: Webhook-driven status only—do not treat as x402 attempt truth.
